title: Rocket Launch Countdown
lyrics: Five, four, three, two, one! Rockets fly, see them run! Up so high into the sky, wave the moon a big goodbye!

title: Moon Stroll Lullaby
lyrics: Soft moon, slow moon, bouncing on my toes, moon. Stardust in my hair, gravity is rare. Hop and float and twirl, in a silver swirl.

title: Planet Parade Song
lyrics: Mercury, Venus, Earth and Mars, Jupiter spins among the stars. Saturn rings and Neptune blue, Uranus tips and waves at you.

title: Constellation Quest
lyrics: Trace the bear across the night, Orion's belt is shining bright. Cassiopeia sits in her chair, point to a star and make it a dare.

title: Wizard Spark Spell
lyrics: Wave your wand and tap the floor, sparkles dance from door to door. Whisper soft a magic word, then a giggle can be heard.

title: Magic Cloak Twirl
lyrics: Twirl, twirl, my cloak is wide, ribbons rippling at my side. Stars and stripes and rainbow seams, a cloak that's woven out of dreams.

title: Potion Bubble Brew
lyrics: Bubble, bubble, simmer slow, stir the pot and watch it glow. Add a feather, add a leaf, brew a charm beyond belief.

title: Spellbook Chant
lyrics: Open the book, the pages hum, ancient runes begin to drum. Speak the words with steady tone, magic answers on its own.

title: Explorer Boots March
lyrics: Stomp, stomp, my boots are tall, ready for an adventure call. Over hill and under tree, follow me and follow me!

title: Mountain Peak Cheer
lyrics: Up we climb, the wind is cool, summit air is bright as jewel. Wave the flag and shout hooray, we reached the top of the day!

title: Jungle Trail Trek
lyrics: Vines above and leaves below, parrots chatter as we go. Splash a puddle, hop a log, every step a brand new cog.

title: Treasure Map Trail
lyrics: Ten steps north, then turn around, follow the path that hugs the ground. X marks the spot beneath the oak, dig with care, no time to joke.

title: Puppy Park Parade
lyrics: Wag, wag, tails so bright, puppies dancing in the light. Sniff a flower, chase a ball, friendly faces, one and all.

title: Kitten Pounce Tune
lyrics: Crouch and wiggle, tail a-twitch, kittens leap without a hitch. Pounce the yarn and roll around, soft as feathers, no sound.

title: Elephant Stomp Rhyme
lyrics: Big gray feet on the savanna floor, trunks that trumpet, ears that soar. Slow and steady, herd in line, elephants are friends of mine.

title: Whale Song Deep
lyrics: Deep below where sunlight bends, the whale a wordless message sends. Long low notes through cold blue space, friends will find me by my trace.

title: Fire Truck Zoom
lyrics: Red truck zoom and siren shout, hoses ready, helpers out. Climb the ladder, save the cat, the fire crew is where it's at.

title: Tractor Field Tune
lyrics: Putter, putter, tractor goes, plowing rows in tidy rows. Seeds will sleep beneath the dirt, soon a green leaf gives a flirt.

title: Train Whistle Rhyme
lyrics: Chug-a-chug, the train rolls past, mountain tunnels coming fast. Whistle hoots a friendly call, climb aboard, there's room for all.

title: Spaceship Launchpad
lyrics: Engines warm and gauges green, smoothest launch I've ever seen. Push the throttle, hold the dream, ride the silver engine stream.

title: Snack Time Jig
lyrics: Crunchy apple, crackers too, cheese and grapes, a tasty crew. Wash it down with sips of juice, snack time is a sweet excuse.

title: Pancake Flip Song
lyrics: Sizzle, sizzle, batter pour, golden circles on the floor. Flip the pancake, catch it neat, syrup makes it extra sweet.

title: Pizza Party Cheer
lyrics: Round and red, the pizza pie, cheese is stretching to the sky. Slice it up and share with friends, party fun that never ends.

title: Soup Stew Stirring
lyrics: Carrots, onions, celery dice, sprinkle in a pinch of spice. Stir the pot and let it hum, supper's almost ready, come.

title: Best Buddy Bounce
lyrics: Hop and jump and high-five too, best of friends are me and you. Side by side and hand in hand, we're the very best of band.

title: Share A Smile Song
lyrics: Pass a smile and pass it round, smiles can travel without a sound. Soft and warm and bright as gold, friendship never gets too old.

title: Team Up Tune
lyrics: Pull together, push together, big or small, in any weather. Teamwork makes the heavy light, side by side and shoulder tight.

title: Lend A Hand Anthem
lyrics: When the road grows long and steep, friends are promises we keep. Reach across and offer aid, that's how lasting bonds are made.

title: Pirate Deck Stomp
lyrics: Yo ho ho, stomp on the deck, parrot perched upon my neck. Hoist the sails and steer the ship, off we go on a salty trip.

title: Treasure Chest Shanty
lyrics: Heave the chest, the lid is heavy, gold doubloons, a glinting bevy. Captain laughs and counts the gleam, crew sings out a sailor's dream.

title: Sailor Sea Rhyme
lyrics: Salty wind and ocean spray, sailors row the waves away. Watch the gull and chart the star, every harbor near or far.

title: Kraken Tide Ballad
lyrics: Beneath the tide a shadow rolls, kraken counts the sailor's souls. Steady hand and steady eye, ride the wave and wave goodbye.

title: Knight Shield March
lyrics: Clang the shield and tap the floor, brave knight marches out the door. Up the hill and round the wall, kind and steady, standing tall.

title: Castle Banner Song
lyrics: High above the castle wall, banners wave for one and all. Bright with stripes of red and blue, every flag a friendly view.

title: Dragon Friendship Rhyme
lyrics: Once a dragon scared the town, knight rode in and put sword down. Shared a snack and shared a name, dragons need a friend the same.

title: Quest Of Honor
lyrics: Take the oath beneath the oak, brave and true through any yoke. Honor lifts the heaviest load, courage lights the longest road.

title: Rainy Day Puddles
lyrics: Splash, splash, puddles big and small, raindrops bounce and tap the wall. Boots on, hats on, here we go, splashing in a happy row.

title: Sunny Skip Song
lyrics: Sunshine warm upon my nose, skipping where the daisy grows. Buttercup and butter sky, summer makes the day go by.

title: Snowflake Twirl Tune
lyrics: Snowflakes twirl on chilly air, lacy patterns everywhere. Catch one gently on your tongue, taste the winter, soft and young.

title: Thunder Rumble Rhyme
lyrics: Distant thunder rolls along, sky is humming a low song. Count the seconds, count the miles, lightning answers in bright styles.

title: Tambourine Tap Along
lyrics: Tap a tap on the tambourine, brightest sound I've ever seen. Jingle, jangle, shake and play, music makes a happy day.

title: Drum Circle Beat
lyrics: Boom and pat and boom again, drums talk back like silver rain. Hands together, hands apart, every beat begins the heart.

title: Ukulele Strum Song
lyrics: Strum a little, strum a lot, ukulele on my cot. Four small strings and one big smile, play a song for just a while.

title: Orchestra Overture
lyrics: Strings begin and brass replies, woodwinds whisper through the skies. Cymbals crash and timpani roll, every instrument is whole.

title: Silly Noodle Dance
lyrics: Wiggle like a noodle, flop like a fish, silly little dance is my favorite wish. Spaghetti arms and floppy knees, dance around just as you please.

title: Wobble Wiggle Song
lyrics: Wobble left and wiggle right, silly faces, what a sight. Shake your shoulders, stomp your feet, silly is a special treat.

title: Banana Hat Ballad
lyrics: I wore a banana on my head, marched right through the flower bed. Bees said hi and birds said why, but a banana hat reaches the sky.

title: Tongue Twister Tune
lyrics: Sally sells silly silver slippers, swiftly swirling sleepy whippers. Try to say it three times fast, watch your tongue trip on the last.

title: Lullaby Of Stars
lyrics: Stars are quiet, stars are kind, lullabies for sleepy mind. Drift on currents soft and slow, where the gentle comets glow.

title: Kazoo Parade
lyrics: Buzz a kazoo, march in a line, follow the leader, single file fine. Marching band of one or two, every parade begins with you.
